semanticNodeLabels: Implement strict, audit, and permissive memory policy modes
Teach heartbeat to select the next governed slice after phase closure
Memory policy supports strict, audit, and permissive modes.
Formalize the epistemic, policy, and audit primitives that make Victor's memory system inspectable, phase-gated, and safe to promote beyond structural GraphRAG capability.
Audit entries capture governance results and before/after state for task mutations.
Automation runs produce run-started, action, and run-completed audit entries.
recommendedNextActions: Implement memory policy supports strict, audit, and permissive modes

before.title: Implement strict, audit, and permissive memory policy modes
before.description: Support enforcement modes for memory governance so operators can run fail-closed in production, audit in tuning windows, and permissive in controlled development without drifting policy semantics.
acceptance: Memory policy supports strict, audit, and permissive modes.
Audit mode logs what would have been blocked without mutating behavior.
Mode selection is configurable globally and per phase.
